text:
First Team

Club

Tickets & Museum

Download the official FC Barcelona App

Prepare yourself fora unique and unforgettable experience!The thrilling match everyone is eagerly anticipating is about to begin, andthe crowd is waiting with enthusiasm outside the Estadi Olímpic. Meanwhile, inside the stadium, the engines are warming up to offer you anunforgettable spectacle with the most anticipated stars. Dazzling lights, cameras ready to capture every moment, journalists prepared to provide coverage, and technical teams working tirelessly to ensure everything goes perfectly.This is yourunique opportunityto witness this event practically on your own at the Estadi Olímpic thatopens exclusively for you.Can you feel the excitement?

After receiving a warm private welcome, you will have the opportunity to explorethe most exclusive areas of the stadium. You will visit the prestigiouspresidential box, get to know thepress roomwhere influential journalists gather, enter theinterview area, and, of course, be where the players will be in a few hours. You'll even have the chance to step onto theplaying field, where the magic happens.All of this will be accompanied by anofficial guidewho willreveal the best-kept secrets of the moments leading up to a matchat the Estadi Olímpic.The Match Day Tour is our most special experience, as it's the live match day, and who knows what could happen! This is your opportunity to experience the excitement of a match in a unique and exclusive way. Don't miss it!

General- 99€

**Languages available audioguide: catalan, spanish, english, french, german, italian, portuguese, dutch, japanese, chinese, aràbic, korean, russina and polish.

Children under the age of 3 have free ticket. They must be accompanied by an adult over 18 years old.

The Match Day tour is a space with many stairs and unevenness, so the Tour is not adapted for wheelchair users.

This tour involves a route with many stairs and uneven surfaces, so it is not suitable for wheelchair users. Ticket sales with a 15% discount code for people with a disability certificate of 33% or more. Request discount codehere.

Participants must be in front of the Accreditation Center, 15 minutes before the visit. In case of arriving outside of this schedule, the visit to the Match Day Tour will not be possible.

Download the official FC Barcelona App
title: MATCH DAY TOUR ESTADI OLÍMPIC
description: Visit for all the latest news, photos, and updates on FC Barcelona!
